description.en: Returns the currently selected alternative configuration of this interface. By default this is theUSBAlternateInterfacefromalternateswithalternateSettingequal to0. It can be changed by callingUSBDevice.selectAlternateInterface()with any other value found inalternates.

excerpt.en: Returns the currently selected alternative configuration of this interface. By default this is theUSBAlternateInterfacefromalternateswithalternateSettingequal to0. It can be changed by callingUSBDevic...

description.en: Returns the alternate setting number of this interface. This is equal to thebAlternateSettingfield of the interface descriptor defining this interface.

excerpt.es: Returns the alternate setting number of this interface. This is equal to thebAlternateSettingfield of the interface descriptor defining this interface.
excerpt.en: Returns the alternate setting number of this interface. This is equal to thebAlternateSettingfield of the interface descriptor defining this interface.

description.en: Returns an array containing instances of theUSBAlternateInterfaceinterface describing each of the alternative configurations possible for this interface.

excerpt.es: Returns an array containing instances of theUSBAlternateInterfaceinterface describing each of the alternative configurations possible for this interface.
